title: Tirupati Medical Centre - Home
heading: How to contact us
description: A Primary and Secondary care hospital offering a range of medical services around Surgery, Gynaecology, General Medicine and Diagnositcs. Founded and run by a team of highly experienced Surgeon and a senior Gynaecologist.
text:
Tirupati Medical Centre - Home TIRUPATI MEDICAL CENTRE TIRUPATI MEDICAL CENTRE Home About the practice Consultation times Services Medical Notes Contact us How to contact us Tirupati Medical Centre C-10 Shivalik, Panchsheel Geetanjali Road (near Malviya Nagar Metro Station), New Delhi - 110017, India Phone +91-11-41613543 Email reception@tirupatimedicalcentre.com Our consultation times Mon - Sat: 09:00am - 2:00pm IST and 5:00pm - 9:00pm IST Sunday: Only by appointments Patient Information and Our Services From diagnosis to therapy: This is where you can find out all about the services and facilities we provide for you. Look at our services Welcome to Tirupati Medical Centre The doctors and staff at Tirupati Medical Centre in New Delhi are  proud to offer the highest standard of patient-centred healthcare. At TMC we manage conditions requiring primary and
secondary care and offer a wide variety of other medical, gynaecological, obstetric and surgical services including antenatal and postnatal care, adoloscent care, infertility diagnosis and
treatment, post-menopausal care, minor and major surgeries, childhood vaccinations and well-person check-ups. Our in-house medical services, in New Delhi, cover a wide range of general medicine and internist techniques ranging from examination to therapy. Find out here about our services and our practice team . About us We attach great importance to  personal relationship with our patients.  Whether in the reception or the examination room, you will always feel you are in good hands.
